_publications._publicationTitle: Comparing 3D imaging devices for the measurement of cutaneous neurofibromas in patients with Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: Vectra H1 software required the longest time for analysis (5.0–9.5 min)... LifeViz Micro had the shortest total image acquisition and analysis time (∼4.5 min) compared to Vectra H1 (∼7.5 min)
details: Required longest analysis time (5.0-9.5 min) but had lowest hardware cost (~$17,000) and cumulative total time of ~7.5 min
